name: Fundbox
description: Fundbox is an API-first embedded working capital platform that enables B2B sellers and platforms to offer net payment terms, credit underwriting, and working capital financing. Founded in 2013 and headquartered in Plano, TX, Fundbox has unlocked over $6 billion in capital for more than 170,000 small businesses.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Fundbox Partner API
hasOfferCatalog.description: An API stack for platforms to embed white-labeled net payment terms, credit underwriting, and working capital financing directly within their B2B applications.
